title: OpenAMP Human Review Decision Log
description: Schema for human review decisions required by AGENTS.md §8.

date.description: ISO 8601 date of the review decision

reviewer_name.description: Full name of the human reviewer

decision_type.description: Type of decision being logged, matching AGENTS.md §8 categories

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence that informed the decision (PR URLs, document paths, issue numbers)

dissent_flag.description: True if any reviewer dissented from the majority decision

dissent_notes.description: Explanation of dissenting viewpoint, if dissent_flag is true

supersedes.description: entry_id of a previous decision that this entry overrides

related_entries.description: Related entry_ids for tracking chains of decisions
